notes: SessionStart is optional and must be explicitly trusted by the host.
Plugin hooks receive PLUGIN_ROOT and writable PLUGIN_DATA; they run with session cwd and JSON on stdin.
Version-fingerprint state is stored under PLUGIN_DATA (never the project/session cwd).
On unchanged fingerprint the hook exits 0 with no stdout; on change it may emit SessionStart additionalContext.
Manual fallbacks: changeguard scan <inventory-root> (fixture adapter) and changeguard scan-system (registered system adapter).
